title: Channels of communication
summary: 9609 A Level — one-way, two-way, and grapevine channels.

simpleExplanation.title: Paths messages follow
simpleExplanation.summary: Channels may be vertical, horizontal, or diagonal. Two-way channels allow feedback; grapevine spreads unofficial news fast.

sections.content: **Channels** (7.2.3) links **structure 7.1** to **communication flow**. Diagram **chain vs wheel** if helpful.
